142583.name: Total confirmed deaths due to COVID-19

display.entityAnnotationsMap:
European Union: Some EU countries changed methodology. See country-by-country series.
Spain: Apr 25: methodology change
India: Jun 17: earlier deaths added
Italy: Jun 25: methodology change
United States: Jun 26: probable/earlier deaths added & Jul 1: probable/earlier deaths added
Czech Republic: Jul 5: methodology change
Kyrgyzstan: Jul 18: methodology change
Chile: Jul 18: methodology change
Peru: Jul 24: earlier deaths added
United Kingdom: Aug 14: methodology change
Bolivia: Sep 7: probable/earlier deaths added
Ecuador: Sep 7: probable/earlier deaths added & Oct 9: probable/earlier deaths added
Argentina: Oct 2: earlier deaths added
Mexico: Oct 9: probable/earlier deaths added

142583.s_name: European CDC – Situation Update Worldwide – Last updated 14 October, 10:05 (London time)

source.name: European CDC – Situation Update Worldwide – Last updated 14 October, 10:05 (London time)
source.dataPublishedBy: European Centre for Disease Prevention and Control (ECDC)
source.additionalInfo: Raw data on confirmed cases and deaths for all countries is sourced from the European Centre for Disease Prevention and Control (ECDC). Our complete COVID-19 dataset is a collection of the COVID-19 data maintained by Our World in Data. It is updated daily and includes data on confirmed cases, deaths, and testing. We have created a new description of all our data sources. You find it at our GitHub repository here. There you can download all of our data.
